title: orianthera serpyllifolia subsp. angustifolia
intro: Orianthera serpyllifolia subsp. angustifolia, also known as a sub-species of the Orianthera serpyllifolia plant, is a flowering perennial plant native to Australia, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal various health issues. The health benefits of Orianthera serpyllifolia subsp. angustifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Orianthera serpyllifolia subsp. angustifolia can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it may be used as a component in herbal remedies and supplements.
